MINI MINUTES: JPT Tiela Chalmerg, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not reported. (218/206)

APPEARANCES:
Jesus Lopez, property manager, representing plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic.
Arnold Evje representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Allen Robinson is present.
J.R. Gabbard representing the defendant by limited scope.

This matters comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. Litigants, counsel and Judge Pro Tem confer privately.

Settlement is reached, trial date is off calendar.
